figures.caption: Fig. 4. PB selection during inference using nearest-neighbor retrieval in the initial observation embedding space. Several points are shown with their corresponding initial observation images.
Fig. 6. PCA visualization of PBs learned by the proposed method under {DS ,DF } (left) and {DS ,Dlow F } (right). Red and blue points denote PBs of successful and failed demonstrations, respectively.

Fig. 5. Overview of failure data selection based on the KL metric. The left panel shows the PCA projection of all PBs, with red for successful PBs and blue-to-green for failure PBs according to their KL metric values. The blue-to-green gradient indicates increasing KL metric values and corresponds to the colors in the right panel, where failure samples are sorted by the metric averaged over five training runs relative to the minimum value.
Fig. 2. Overview of the proposed method. The boxed area indicates the proposed modules added to the baseline ACT.
